meaning: n.贩卖修理用零件的市场
examples: The company serves the national automotive aftermarket with a broad range of accessory and recreational-vehicle products.
It's illegal to get into a formal agreement with investors that they'll buy in the aftermarket.
As always, these elements are priced competitively to capture the aftermarket business.
Shares tumbled 8.1% in aftermarket trading after an earlier rally as investors digested the news.
Some racy tires and aftermarket suspension tuning would transform the handling of this car.
